title: Presentation Night
author: Presentation Night
description:
The best explanation for what we're all about (short version: music and footy) is probably best found in this piece called Teenage Kicks which kicked off the site during that heady, unforgettable autumn of 2013...

We're also presenting a live show...

It's called: PRESENTATION NIGHT #2
It is: A conversation about music, football...and life. Featuring TIM ROGERS, MATTHEW RICHARDSON and hosted by FRANCIS LEACH. 
It's at: THE CORNER HOTEL, 57 SWAN ST RICHMOND VIC 3121
It's on: THURSDAY AUGUST 15, 2013
Tickets: On sale NOW from The Corner Box Office online
Tel: 03 9427 9198
